title: Asteroid-Belt Buffer Allocation across a Refining Tree
strategies: equal-split: divide the buffer budget evenly across all stations, ignoring demand scale (baseline)
independent newsvendor: set each station to its own critical-fractile safety stock, then rescale the safety part to fit the budget; ignores pooling and the service floor

SAA + budget-projected reallocation: draw own scenarios from the announced distribution, start from the newsvendor point, then greedily shift buffer between stations to cut the simulated holding+transfer+shortage cost while holding the service floor
pooling-aware concentration: over-invest cheap-holding parent stations so downstream shortfalls are covered by routed surplus, trading transfer cost against per-child safety stock
